name: Example: Compound weekly borrowers
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('week', block_time) AS "week", COUNT(distinct borrower) AS "Unique borrowers" FROM compound."view_borrow" WHERE block_time > now() - interval '10 weeks' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

name: Example: Dai daily transfer volume
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) as day, SUM(value/1e18) FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer" WHERE evt_block_time > now() - interval '7 days' AND contract_address = '\\x6b175474e89094c44da98b954eedeac495271d0f' GROUP BY 1;

name: Bloom - Unique addresses attested
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('week', tx.block_time) AS week, count(DISTINCT subject) FROM bloom."AttestationLogic_evt_TraitAttested" a, ethereum.transactions tx WHERE tx.hash = a.tx_hash GROUP BY week

name: Compound v1 USD borrow volume per token
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', tx.block_time) AS monthStarting, p.symbol AS token, SUM((b.amount / 1e18) * p.average) AS usdAmount FROM compoundv1."MoneyMarket_evt_BorrowTaken" b, ethereum.transactions tx, coincap."tokens/usd" p WHERE b.tx_hash = tx.hash AND b."asset" = p.asset AND date_trunc('minute', p.time) = date_trunc('minute', tx.block_time) AND tx.success = TRUE GROUP BY monthStarting, token ORDER BY monthStarting;

name: Unique weekly borrowers and lenders on Compound
query_sql: WITH borrowers as (SELECT date_trunc('week', tx.block_time) AS week, count(DISTINCT b.account) as uniqueBorrowers FROM compoundv1."MoneyMarket_evt_BorrowTaken" b LEFT JOIN ethereum.transactions tx ON tx.hash = b.tx_hash GROUP BY week), suppliers as (SELECT date_trunc('week', tx.block_time) AS week, count(DISTINCT s.account) as uniqueSuppliers FROM compoundv1."MoneyMarket_evt_SupplyReceived" s LEFT JOIN ethereum.transactions tx ON tx.hash = s.tx_hash GROUP BY week) SELECT borrowers.week, SUM(borrowers.uniqueBorrowers) as uniqueBorrowers, SUM(suppliers.uniqueSuppliers) as uniqueSuppliers FROM borrowers, suppliers WHERE borrowers.week = suppliers.week GROUP BY borrowers.week

name: DutchX discount - DAI auctioned for WETH
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) as date, avg("sellVolume" / "buyVolume") as "DutchX price", avg(eth.average / dai.average) as "Market price", (avg("sellVolume" / "buyVolume") / avg(eth.average / dai.average) - 1)*100 as "discount" FROM gnosis."DutchExchange_evt_AuctionCleared" c, ethereum.transactions tx, coincap."tokens/usd" eth, coincap."tokens/usd" dai WHERE "sellToken" = '\\x89d24A6b4CcB1B6fAA2625fE562bDD9a23260359' AND "buyToken" = '\\xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2' AND c.tx_hash = tx.hash AND tx.success = true GROUP BY 1;

name: top holders
query_sql: WITH latest_balances AS (...) inflow AS (...) outflow AS (...) SELECT address, amount, percent, netflow_24h, netflow_7d ORDER BY amount DESC

name: active borrowers snapshot
query_sql: WITH base_borrowing AS (...) SELECT address, collateral, existing_debt, borrowing_apr, LTV WHERE existing_debt > 0

name: address labels for 0x68*
query_sql: SELECT * FROM labels.addresses WHERE varbinary_substring(address, 1, 1) = 0x68

name: staking strategy list
query_sql: WITH deposit AS (...) SELECT contract_address, symbol, decimals, strategy

name: daily active users
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, COUNT(DISTINCT tx_from) AS dau FROM transactions GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

name: top pools by volume
query_sql: WITH pool_volume AS (...) SELECT pool_address, token0, token1, volume_24h, volume_7d ORDER BY volume_24h DESC

name: whale transfers last 7d
query_sql: SELECT block_time, tx_from, tx_to, amount WHERE amount > 1000000 ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: holder distribution
query_sql: WITH balances AS (...) SELECT bucket, count(*) as holders FROM (CASE WHEN amount > X THEN 'whale' ...) GROUP BY bucket

name: protocol tvl over time
query_sql: WITH daily_deposits AS (...) daily_withdrawals AS (...) SELECT day, cumulative_tvl ORDER BY day

name: gas fees by contract
query_sql: SELECT to AS contract, SUM(gas_used * gas_price) AS total_fees, COUNT(*) AS tx_count GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_fees DESC

name: nft collection floor over time
query_sql: WITH daily_floors AS (...) SELECT day, min_price, avg_price, sales_count ORDER BY day

name: bridge volume by chain
query_sql: WITH bridge_txs AS (...) SELECT source_chain, dest_chain, SUM(amount) AS volume GROUP BY 1,2

name: validator performance
query_sql: SELECT validator, blocks_proposed, blocks_missed, uptime_pct, total_rewards ORDER BY total_rewards DESC

name: dex trades last 24h
query_sql: SELECT block_time, maker, taker, amount_in, amount_out, pair FROM trades WHERE block_time > now() - interval '24 hours'

name: weekly new wallets
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('week', min_block_time) AS week, COUNT(*) AS new_wallets FROM (SELECT tx_from, MIN(block_time) AS min_block_time FROM transactions GROUP BY 1) GROUP BY 1

name: liquidation events
query_sql: WITH liquidation_events AS (...) SELECT block_time, liquidator, borrower, collateral_asset, debt_asset, seized_amount ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: top nft traders by profit
query_sql: WITH buys AS (...) sells AS (...) SELECT address, total_bought, total_sold, profit, trade_count ORDER BY profit DESC

name: stablecoin daily supply
query_sql: WITH daily_mints AS (...) daily_burns AS (...) SELECT day, total_supply, net_change ORDER BY day

name: lending protocol rates
query_sql: SELECT pool, supply_rate, borrow_rate, utilization, total_supplied, total_borrowed

name: pool list with metrics
query_sql: SELECT pool_address, token0_symbol, token1_symbol, fee_tier, tvl, volume_24h ORDER BY tvl DESC

name: daily transaction count
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS tx_count, SUM(gas_used) AS total_gas FROM transactions GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: top contracts by interaction
query_sql: SELECT to AS contract, COUNT(*) AS calls, COUNT(DISTINCT tx_from) AS unique_users FROM transactions GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 100

name: wallet token portfolio
query_sql: WITH balances AS (...) prices AS (...) SELECT token_symbol, balance, usd_value, pct_of_portfolio WHERE address = 0x... ORDER BY usd_value DESC

name: bridge daily volume
query_sql: WITH daily AS (...) SELECT day, total_volume, unique_users, tx_count ORDER BY day

name: nft mint tracker
query_sql: SELECT block_time, minter, token_id, collection, mint_price FROM nft_mints ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: flash loan events
query_sql: WITH flash AS (...) SELECT block_time, borrower, amount, fee, repaid FROM flashloans ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: token unlock schedule
query_sql: SELECT unlock_date, amount, recipient, vesting_type FROM vesting WHERE unlock_date > now() ORDER BY unlock_date

name: daily dex volume
query_sql: WITH swaps AS (...) SELECT day, SUM(amount_usd) AS volume, COUNT(*) AS trades FROM swaps GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: governance proposals
query_sql: SELECT proposal_id, title, proposer, status, votes_for, votes_against, quorum_reached FROM proposals ORDER BY proposal_id DESC

name: wallet first and last activity
query_sql: SELECT address, MIN(block_time) AS first_seen, MAX(block_time) AS last_seen, COUNT(*) AS total_txns FROM transactions GROUP BY 1 WHERE address = 0x...

name: top yield farms
query_sql: WITH farm_data AS (...) SELECT pool, reward_token, apr, tvl, daily_rewards ORDER BY apr DESC

name: daily fees collected
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, SUM(fee_amount) AS total_fees, SUM(fee_amount * price) AS fees_usd FROM fees GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: stablecoin peg deviation
query_sql: WITH hourly_prices AS (...) SELECT hour, price, ABS(price - 1.0) AS deviation FROM prices ORDER BY hour

name: contract creation events
query_sql: SELECT block_time, deployer, contract_address, bytecode_hash FROM traces WHERE type = 'create' ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: nft collection stats
query_sql: SELECT collection, floor_price, total_volume, holder_count, listed_count, unique_owners

name: liquidity pool positions
query_sql: WITH lp_positions AS (...) SELECT address, pool, liquidity, share_pct, tick_lower, tick_upper ORDER BY liquidity DESC

name: token transfer graph
query_sql: SELECT tx_from, tx_to, SUM(amount) AS total_transferred, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM transfers GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY total_transferred DESC

name: daily active contracts
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, COUNT(DISTINCT to) AS active_contracts FROM transactions WHERE to IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: yield curve over time
query_sql: WITH daily_rates AS (...) SELECT day, rate_1d, rate_7d, rate_30d, rate_90d ORDER BY day

name: mempool pending txns
query_sql: SELECT tx_hash, from_address, to_address, value, gas_price, nonce FROM mempool WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY gas_price DESC

name: wallet labels lookup
query_sql: SELECT address, label, source, category, confidence FROM labels.addresses WHERE address = 0x...

name: nft sales history
query_sql: SELECT block_time, buyer, seller, token_id, price_eth, price_usd FROM nft_trades WHERE collection = '...' ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: top gas spenders
query_sql: SELECT tx_from, SUM(gas_used * effective_gas_price) AS total_gas_spent, COUNT(*) AS tx_count FROM transactions GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_gas_spent DESC LIMIT 50

name: daily staking deposits
query_sql: WITH deposits AS (...) SELECT day, SUM(amount) AS total_deposited, COUNT(DISTINCT depositor) AS unique_depositors FROM deposits GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: cross-chain asset balances
query_sql: WITH chain_balances AS (...) SELECT chain, token, balance, usd_value FROM balances WHERE address = 0x... ORDER BY usd_value DESC

name: oracle price feeds
query_sql: SELECT feed_name, latest_price, last_updated, deviation, heartbeat FROM oracle_feeds ORDER BY last_updated DESC

name: dex pair registry
query_sql: SELECT pair_address, token0, token1, exchange, fee_tier, created_at FROM pairs ORDER BY created_at DESC

name: rollup batch submissions
query_sql: SELECT block_time, batch_index, tx_count, data_size, submitter FROM batches ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: daily burn amount
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, SUM(burned_amount) AS total_burned FROM burns GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: staking positions
query_sql: WITH stakers AS (...) SELECT address, staked_amount, shares, entry_date ORDER BY staked_amount DESC

name: amm pool utilization
query_sql: SELECT pool, tvl, volume_24h, volume_24h/tvl AS utilization_ratio, fee_tier FROM pools ORDER BY utilization_ratio DESC

name: governance voter list
query_sql: SELECT voter, vote_power, proposals_voted, last_vote_date, delegate FROM voters ORDER BY vote_power DESC

name: nft wash trading detection
query_sql: WITH trades AS (...) circular AS (...) SELECT address, self_trade_count, self_trade_volume, total_volume, wash_pct ORDER BY wash_pct DESC

name: funding rate history
query_sql: WITH rates AS (...) SELECT timestamp, funding_rate, mark_price, index_price FROM rates ORDER BY timestamp

name: mev bot activity
query_sql: SELECT block_number, bot_address, tx_hash, mev_type, profit_eth FROM mev_transactions ORDER BY block_number DESC

name: daily mev profit
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, SUM(profit) AS total_profit, COUNT(*) AS mev_txns, COUNT(DISTINCT bot) AS active_bots FROM mev GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: wallet age distribution
query_sql: WITH wallet_ages AS (...) SELECT age_bucket, wallet_count, avg_balance FROM (CASE WHEN age_days < 30 THEN 'new' ...) GROUP BY 1

name: token velocity
query_sql: WITH daily_transfers AS (...) supply AS (...) SELECT day, transfer_volume / total_supply AS velocity ORDER BY day

name: lending utilization trend
query_sql: WITH hourly AS (...) SELECT hour, total_supplied, total_borrowed, utilization_pct ORDER BY hour

name: sandwich attack log
query_sql: SELECT block_number, victim_tx, frontrun_tx, backrun_tx, attacker, profit FROM sandwiches ORDER BY block_number DESC

name: weekly cohort retention
query_sql: WITH cohorts AS (...) SELECT cohort_week, weeks_since_first, active_users, retention_pct FROM retention ORDER BY cohort_week, weeks_since_first

name: airdrop eligibility check
query_sql: SELECT address, eligible, criteria_met, estimated_amount FROM eligibility WHERE address = 0x...

name: protocol revenue comparison
query_sql: WITH revenues AS (...) SELECT protocol_category, SUM(fees_usd) AS revenue_30d, SUM(fees_usd)/unique_users AS revenue_per_user ORDER BY revenue_30d DESC

name: delegated voting power
query_sql: SELECT delegate, delegators_count, total_voting_power, pct_of_total FROM delegates ORDER BY total_voting_power DESC

name: erc20 token registry
query_sql: SELECT contract_address, name, symbol, decimals, total_supply, deployer FROM erc20_tokens ORDER BY total_supply DESC

name: block production times
query_sql: SELECT block_number, timestamp, proposer, slot, block_time_ms FROM blocks ORDER BY block_number DESC LIMIT 1000

name: average block time trend
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) AS hour, AVG(block_time_ms) AS avg_block_time, COUNT(*) AS blocks FROM blocks GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY hour

name: nft holder overlap
query_sql: WITH holders_a AS (...) holders_b AS (...) SELECT address, holds_a, holds_b FROM holders_a FULL OUTER JOIN holders_b USING (address)

name: perpetuals open interest
query_sql: WITH oi AS (...) SELECT day, long_oi, short_oi, total_oi, long_short_ratio ORDER BY day

name: token concentration index
query_sql: WITH top_holders AS (...) SELECT top_10_pct, top_50_pct, top_100_pct, herfindahl_index FROM concentration

name: stablecoin flows between chains
query_sql: WITH inflows AS (...) outflows AS (...) SELECT chain, net_flow_24h, net_flow_7d, total_supply ORDER BY ABS(net_flow_24h) DESC

name: smart contract events log
query_sql: SELECT block_time, contract, event_name, topic0, decoded_data FROM logs WHERE contract = 0x... ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: whale accumulation tracker
query_sql: WITH daily_balances AS (...) SELECT day, whale_count, total_whale_balance, pct_of_supply FROM daily_balances ORDER BY day

name: dex aggregator market share
query_sql: WITH agg_volume AS (...) SELECT aggregator, volume_24h, volume_7d, market_share_pct, trade_count ORDER BY volume_24h DESC

name: bridge exploit tracker
query_sql: SELECT block_time, bridge, attacker, amount_stolen, method FROM exploits ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: daily new token deployments
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS new_tokens FROM erc20_tokens GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: dao treasury holdings
query_sql: SELECT token, balance, usd_value, pct_of_treasury FROM treasury WHERE dao = '...' ORDER BY usd_value DESC

name: blob gas market
query_sql: SELECT block_number, blob_gas_used, blob_gas_price, blob_count, excess_blob_gas FROM blocks ORDER BY block_number DESC

name: daily liquidation volume
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS liquidations, SUM(seized_amount_usd) AS volume FROM liquidations GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: ens domain registry
query_sql: SELECT name, owner, expiry_date, registration_date, resolver FROM ens_names WHERE name LIKE '%.eth' ORDER BY registration_date DESC

name: token emission schedule
query_sql: WITH emissions AS (...) SELECT month, circulating_supply, new_emissions, inflation_rate FROM schedule ORDER BY month

name: nft royalty revenue
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, SUM(royalty_amount) AS total_royalties, COUNT(*) AS sales_with_royalty FROM trades WHERE royalty_amount > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: lending rate arbitrage
query_sql: WITH rates AS (...) SELECT pool_a, pool_b, rate_a, rate_b, spread FROM cross_rates WHERE spread > 0.01 ORDER BY spread DESC

name: block reward history
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', timestamp) AS day, AVG(block_reward) AS avg_reward, SUM(block_reward) AS total_rewards FROM blocks GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: stablecoin depeg events
query_sql: WITH prices AS (...) SELECT timestamp, price, deviation, duration_hours FROM depeg_events WHERE ABS(price - 1.0) > 0.01 ORDER BY timestamp DESC

name: daily inscription count
query_sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS inscriptions, SUM(fee) AS total_fees FROM inscriptions GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY day

name: real yield protocol ranking
query_sql: WITH revenue AS (...) emissions AS (...) SELECT protocol_category, revenue_30d, emissions_30d, revenue_30d - emissions_30d AS real_yield ORDER BY real_yield DESC

name: multisig transaction queue
query_sql: SELECT safe_address, nonce, to, value, data, confirmations, threshold FROM pending_txns WHERE safe = 0x... ORDER BY nonce

name: layer2 tps comparison
query_sql: WITH daily_tps AS (...) SELECT chain, avg_tps, max_tps, tx_count_24h ORDER BY avg_tps DESC

name: token buyback events
query_sql: SELECT block_time, amount, price, total_usd, source_wallet FROM buybacks ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: account abstraction wallets
query_sql: SELECT block_time, sender, paymaster, gas_sponsored, entry_point FROM user_ops ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: rollup cost comparison
query_sql: WITH costs AS (...) SELECT chain, avg_l1_cost, avg_l2_cost, savings_pct, batch_count_24h ORDER BY savings_pct DESC

name: wallet profitability analysis
query_sql: WITH buys AS (...) sells AS (...) SELECT address, total_invested, total_returned, pnl, roi_pct, win_rate ORDER BY roi_pct DESC LIMIT 100

name: restaking operator list
query_sql: SELECT operator, total_staked, delegators, commission_rate, status FROM operators ORDER BY total_staked DESC

name: nft rarity ranking
query_sql: WITH rarity_scores AS (...) SELECT token_id, rarity_score, rank, trait_count FROM scores ORDER BY rank ASC

name: option expiry calendar
query_sql: SELECT expiry_date, strike_price, option_type, open_interest, notional_value FROM options WHERE expiry_date > now() ORDER BY expiry_date

name: duplicate contract bytecode
query_sql: WITH bytecodes AS (...) SELECT bytecode_hash, COUNT(*) AS deployment_count, ARRAY_AGG(contract_address) AS contracts GROUP BY 1 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY deployment_count DESC

name: token pair correlation
query_sql: WITH daily_returns AS (...) SELECT token_a, token_b, correlation_30d, correlation_90d FROM correlations ORDER BY ABS(correlation_30d) DESC

name: validator slash events
query_sql: SELECT block_time, validator, slash_amount, reason FROM slashing_events ORDER BY block_time DESC

name: daily stablecoin market share
query_sql: WITH supply AS (...) SELECT symbol, total_supply, market_share_pct ORDER BY total_supply DESC

name: token supply breakdown
query_sql: SELECT category, amount, pct_of_total FROM supply_breakdown ORDER BY amount DESC
